era: 1978-1986. San Francisco / touring. Hardcore. E=9 -- NEW S36 ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM. First E=9 in the engine.

location.influence_target: Seattle, WA (touring circuit, Alternative Tentacles connection)

entry_type: Seattle influence -- NOT a Seattle band. Connection: Alternative Tentacles Records (The Fartz at degree 270), Seattle touring (Metropolis, all-ages venues), Jello Biafra spoken word tours.
members: Jello Biafra (vocals, real name Eric Reed Boucher)

theory_nodes.concept: E=9 -- NEW S36 ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM. First time the engine reaches E=9. Previous max E=8. Dead Kennedys' arrival permanently expands the scale. Three consecutive E=9 entries follow (286-288).
theory_nodes.description: E=9 threshold crossed at degree 286. Calibration point for the engine's new maximum.

theory_nodes.concept: Alternative Tentacles circuit. Biafra founded label 1979. The Fartz (degree 270) on Alternative Tentacles: direct genealogical connection from DKs to Seattle hardcore. Label as connective tissue for West Coast confrontational punk.
theory_nodes.description: Alternative Tentacles as the mechanism of DKs-Seattle connection.

theory_nodes.concept: Influence entry format. Dead Kennedys are San Francisco band documented for Seattle influence: touring (Metropolis), label connection (Alt. Tentacles / The Fartz), Biafra spoken word. Format acknowledges Seattle hardcore's non-isolated development.
theory_nodes.description: Seattle 360 influence entry -- non-Seattle band with documented Seattle circuit.

theory_nodes.concept: East Bay Ray's guitar: surf rock + spy film + hardcore tempo. No other band of the era sounded like this. High treble, reverb, twang at hardcore speed. Defines E=9 sonic character.
theory_nodes.description: The DKs' sonic signature: surf-hardcore guitar collapse.

cross_references.relationship: Alternative Tentacles. Seattle hardcore on the DKs' label. The direct genealogical line from Dead Kennedys to Seattle scene.
E=9 ties the new maximum. LA hardcore, SST Records. West Coast hardcore influence arc, second of two consecutive influence entries.
E=9 third consecutive. Seattle post-hardcore returns to engine at new maximum. Their degree 218 E=8 now retroactively understated.

sps_pair.pairing_note: FIRST HYDROBATIDAE. E=6 + E=9 = E=15. Maximum S36 energy paired with small seabird colony chattering. Extreme contrast.
